geography.data_source: BBMP ward boundaries 2023, Google Earth verification

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 ward-level data extrapolated with BBMP 2023 estimates; literacy from Karnataka DISE 2021-22; SC/ST share from Census 2011 SC/ST tables for Bangalore Urban district

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round (2020-21) Periodic Labour Force Survey for urban Karnataka adjusted with NASSCOM IT salary surveys 2023; informal rate from ILO India Employment Report 2024 for IT corridor zones

commute_profile.data_source: BMRCL Purple Line Phase 2 extension ridership data 2024; DULT Bengaluru Comprehensive Mobility Plan 2020; Ola Mobility Institute Bengaluru commute report 2023; car ownership estimated from RTO Bangalore Urban registration data 2023

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: fare_sensitivity low due to high incomes (NSSO 78th Round consumption data); examination_sensitivity high due to tech-sector competitive hiring; diffusion_speed high due to digital-first workforce; loss_aversion low due to financial cushion; trust scores estimated from Lokniti-CSDS Trust in Institutions Survey 2024 urban Karnataka subset

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from NASSCOM ecosystem survey 2023 (workplace network density in IT parks); clustering lower than residential zones due to transient workforce; cross-income bridge higher due to tech company mixed-role teams

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Forum Value Mall footfall from CBRE India Retail Report 2023; employment estimated from BBMP trade license data for Whitefield ward
Estimated from BBMP street vendor survey 2022 for Whitefield Main Road area; transit dependency higher due to vendor commute patterns from surrounding areas

data_source: Composite zone config built from Census 2011 (demographics), NSSO PLFS 78th Round (income/employment), BMRCL ridership reports 2024 (transit), DULT CMP 2020 (commute), NASSCOM 2023 (IT workforce), BBMP 2023 (ward boundaries and population projections)
